justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal preferences throughout the conversation, including specific dates and the shift to 'any day, any time'.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check other times or days when the requested slots were unavailable, which was helpful, but sometimes offered a very wide range of dates (e.g., 'later in June, or perhaps in July') without narrowing down options first.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made many API calls to check availability for online meetings, even after the user showed flexibility, leading to a lengthy conversation before suggesting a different contact medium.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was somewhat tiring due to the repeated apologies and the extensive number of turns required to find an available slot, even after the user expressed flexibility.

overall_notes: The agent was persistent in checking for online availability, which was good, but could have been more proactive in suggesting alternative contact mediums earlier when online slots were clearly scarce.
